# ctyun_mysql_recoverable_time_points (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10033813/10098797



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

# instance_id 根据实际情况进行替换
data "ctyun_mysql_recoverable_time_points" "example" {
  instance_id = "2619a9e7300348809f4dbb2e7ead6cc0"
  project_id  = "0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) mysql 实例id

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) 项目ID
- `region_id` (String) 区域ID

### Read-Only

- `backup_time_points` (Attributes List) 可恢复时间点 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backup_time_points))

<a id="nestedatt--backup_time_points"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backup_time_points`

Read-Only:

- `end_time` (String) 结束时间
- `start_time` (String) 开始时间
